transcription.text: Many doctors recommend limiting cholesterol, total fat, and saturated fat. Since any diet is a matter of the food you eat and how you cook it, you should know that you can cook without adding extra cholesterol or excess fat. Cook with New Clear PAM. New PAM adds virtually no cholesterol, no calories, no saturated fat. You can fry, roast, bake, even broil with PAM. New PAM, now without fluorocarbons, adds virtually no cholesterol, no calories, no saturated fat.

metadata.title: PAM cooking spray to reduce fat
